name: broadcast-fan-out: two <message> blocks each produce a separately-routed outbound
description: An agent that addresses two distinct destinations in one turn must produce two outbound rows, each routed to its own destination — fan-out, not a single merged message.
agentResponse: <message to="discord-test">Maintenance at 02:00 UTC</message><message to="slack-test">Maintenance at 02:00 UTC</message>
